query:
-- FK: campaign_engagements.engagementId → engagements.id
ALTER TABLE campaign_engagements 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_ce_engagement 
FOREIGN KEY (engagementId) REFERENCES engagements(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- FK: engagement_reports.engagementId → engagements.id
ALTER TABLE engagement_reports 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_er_engagement 
FOREIGN KEY (engagementId) REFERENCES engagements(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- FK: server_credentials.serverId → server_configs.id
ALTER TABLE server_credentials 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_sc_server 
FOREIGN KEY (serverId) REFERENCES server_configs(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;

-- FK: discovered_assets.scanId → domain_intel_scans.id
ALTER TABLE discovered_assets 
ADD CONSTRAINT fk_da_scan 
FOREIGN KEY (scanId) REFERENCES domain_intel_scans(id) ON DELETE CASCADE;
